description: The 'Enterprise Software Development Project' is currently loaded in ProjectLibre. The finance department needs resources classified by department for the monthly burn rate report. Assign the following personnel to their respective departments in the 'Group' field: Alice Johnson (Engineering), Bob Smith (Engineering), Carol Williams (Engineering), Emma Davis (QA), and Frank Miller (PMO). Leave all other resources unchanged and export the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/categorized_resources.xml.
